title: Classic Paella
description: A traditional Spanish dish originating from the Valencia region, often served at family gatherings. This recipe showcases the iconic combination of saffron-infused rice and succulent seafood.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add the chorizo and cook until browned, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the mussels, clams, and shrimp. Cook until the seafood is lightly browned, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the saffron-infused rice blend and stir to combine with the seafood and chorizo.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Remove from heat and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Garnish with fresh parsley and lemon wedges, if desired.
